notes: High-purity sintered alumina (Al2O3) armor ceramic. Density 3.85-3.95 g/cm³, Knoop hardness ~1200-1500 HK (15 GPa). Standalone RHAe ~2.0-3.0 per mm vs KE threats. Widely used in body armor (SAPI/ESAPI, AD95 variants), helicopter seat armor, and vehicle composite arrays (Leopard 2, Challenger 2). Cost-effective balance of performance and cost. Fracture toughness K1c ~3.5-4.0 MPa·m^½.

source.reference: Ceramic armor manufacturer datasheets (CoorsTek), ARL research literature
source.methodology: RHAe from ARL and manufacturer ballistic test data on 99.5% Al2O3 tiles vs AP threats, normalized to RHA. Density per manufacturer specifications.
